article.title: Google unveils TurboQuant, a new AI memory compression algorithm — and yes, the internet is calling it ‘Pied Piper’
article.summary: Google’s TurboQuant has the internet joking about Pied Piper from HBO's "Silicon Valley." The compression algorithm promises to shrink AI’s “working memory” by up to 6x, but it’s still just a lab experiment for now.

all_candidates.title: Google unveils TurboQuant, a new AI memory compression algorithm — and yes, the internet is calling it ‘Pied Piper’
all_candidates.summary: Google’s TurboQuant has the internet joking about Pied Piper from HBO's "Silicon Valley." The compression algorithm promises to shrink AI’s “working memory” by up to 6x, but it’s still just a lab experiment for now.

all_candidates.title: Google launches Lyria 3 Pro music generation model
all_candidates.summary: Google is launching Lyria 3 Pro, an upgraded music model that generates longer, more customizable tracks, as it expands AI music tools across Gemini, enterprise products, and other services.

all_candidates.title: Meta launches new initiative to support entrepreneurship, drive AI adoption
all_candidates.summary: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg said in a memo to staff that small businesses have always been a big part of the company's business model, and that while tens of millions of entrepreneurs already use its platforms to grow and connect with customers, the company wants to do more in the space.

all_candidates.title: メルカリ、出品ページの“生成AI画像”に注意喚起　「購入者に誤解与え、取引トラブルになる」
all_candidates.summary: メルカリは、出品時に生成AI画像などを使用する場合の注意点をまとめて公開した。メルカリでは実物のない出品や虚偽情報の記載は禁止していると説明し、生成AI画像の利用に関するルールをまとめた。

all_candidates.title: AIの“長期的なコードの保守能力”はどれほどか？　新たな評価テスト「SWE-CI」　中国チームが提案
all_candidates.summary: 中国の中山大学とアリババグループに所属する研究者らは、AIが長期的にコードの品質を維持できるかを評価するベンチマークを提案した研究報告を発表した。
